title: Chemical Bonding: The Quantum Mechanical Perspective
description: Understand chemical bonding from a quantum mechanical viewpoint, including covalent, ionic, and metallic bonds, and how quantum chemistry quantifies bond properties.
learningObjectives: Explain the quantum mechanical origin of chemical bonding
Distinguish between covalent, ionic, and metallic bonding
Calculate and interpret bond energies and potential energy surfaces
Understand hybridization as a mathematical construction
Apply molecular orbital theory to explain bond properties
Connect bonding concepts to quantum chemistry calculations
